subtitle: Feeding, health & vet care for your feline

views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's feeding timeline, weight trend card, next vet visit countdown, feeding streak ring, and quick-add FAB

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Context-switching entry form that dynamically shows feeding fields, vet visit fields, weight fields, or medication fields based on selected entry type segment

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Chronological log of all care events grouped by date with color-coded type icons, filterable by entry type via chip toggles

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Feeding consistency bar chart, weight trend line chart, vet cost pie breakdown, appetite rolling average, and contextual care insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayFeedingCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of feeding entries logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayFeedings
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All feeding entries for today sorted chronologically for timeline display

viewModelComputedProperties.name: feedingStreakDays
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least dailyGoal feedings logged per day

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageDailyFeedings
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean number of feedings per day over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: feedingConsistencyScore
viewModelComputedProperties.description: 0-100 score measuring how regular feeding times are across days; low standard deviation of meal times yields high score

viewModelComputedProperties.name: latestWeight
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Most recent weight check entry value in kg, nil if no weight entries exist

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weightTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Trend from last 5+ weight entries using slope: 'Gaining' if >2% increase, 'Losing' if >2% decrease, 'Stable' otherwise

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weightChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All weight check entries as date-value pairs for rendering a line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: daysSinceLastVetVisit
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Calendar days since the most recent vet visit entry, nil if no vet visits logged

viewModelComputedProperties.name: nextVetVisitDue
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Estimated next vet visit assuming 6-month checkup interval; returns 'Overdue by X days' or 'Due in X days'

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalVetCostsThisYear
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of cost field across all vet visit entries in the current calendar year

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyFeedingChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 7 days as day-label and feeding-count pairs for a bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: feedingTimeDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Feeding count bucketed by time of day: Morning 5-11, Afternoon 11-17, Evening 17-22, Night 22-5

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageAppetiteThisWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean appetite level (1-5 scale) from this week's feeding entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: appetiteTrendVsPreviousWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change in average appetite this week compared to previous week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of contextual care insight strings generated from feeding regularity, weight changes, vet reminders, and appetite patterns

dailyGoal.description: Target number of feedings per day to maintain streak and show progress ring

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if at least [dailyGoal] feeding entries are logged. Streak breaks on any day with fewer than the target feedings.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Weight: linear regression slope over last 30 days of weight entries, flag if absolute change exceeds 5% in any 14-day window. Appetite: rolling 7-day mean compared to prior 7-day mean, flag if decline exceeds 15%. Feeding consistency: compute standard deviation of feeding-time-of-day across the past 14 days, convert to 0-100 score where σ<30min=100, σ>3hr=0.
insights: Feeding regularity — 'Feeding times are very consistent this week (±Xmin)' or 'Feeding times varied by ±X hours — try to keep a regular schedule'
Weight alert — 'Weight changed X% over the last month' when absolute change exceeds 3%, with direction indicator
Vet reminder — 'It has been X months since last checkup — schedule a visit soon' when >5 months since last checkup-type vet visit
Appetite change — 'Appetite dropped X% this week compared to last week — monitor closely' when weekly decline exceeds 15%
Streak milestone — 'X-day care streak! Excellent consistency' at day 7, 14, 30, 60, 90, 180, 365
Annual cost summary — 'You have spent $X on vet care this year across Y visits'
Meal variety — 'This week: X% wet food, Y% dry food — variety supports balanced nutrition'
Medication adherence — 'Medication logged X of last 7 days' when medication entries exist
